settings.heading: Premium Wellness Supplements
settings.subtext: Premium wellness supplements for energy, beauty, immunity and active living, sourced from Europe and delivered to your door.

settings.title: The everyday essentials
settings.description: The formulas our customers reach for most.

settings.heading: Shop by wellness goal.
settings.subtext: Tell us what you’re working toward and we’ll point you to the right products.

settings.name: Msc. Sara Shehab
settings.bio: Originally from Lebanon and now based in Germany, with a BSc in Nursing and an MSc in Health Sciences. She blends scientific knowledge with a practical, relatable approach — advising on European product standards and the everyday rituals that help us feel good in our own skin.

settings.name: Dr. Tharwat Mohyeldine
settings.bio: A pharmaceutical researcher and medicinal chemist passionate about wellness and preventive health. Through science-backed education and trusted guidance, she helps individuals make informed choices and achieve their health goals.

settings.name: Dr. Sara Mohyeldine
settings.bio: Our Lebanese expert and the one closest to our customers — advising on local needs and making sure each product genuinely fits everyday life in Lebanon.

settings.heading: Real experts, real guidance.
settings.subtext: Every product we carry is reviewed by an independent panel of specialists across Europe and Lebanon.

settings.heading: Ready-made routines.
settings.subtext: Hand-picked combinations our panel reaches for — a simpler way to start.

settings.heading: A family-led wellness brand.
settings.subtext: Our goal is to bring trusted European wellness products closer to customers in Lebanon, based in West Bekaa, Al Qaraoun.
